title: Starbucks India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Starbucks India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Starbucks India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Starbucks India:
Starbucks India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Starbucks India!
